whyChoose.description: We design and manufacture high-performance solar inverters, panels, batteries, and EV charging equipment built for reliability, efficiency, and long-term durability.
whyChoose.reason1Description: Our on-grid, off-grid, and hybrid solar inverters are engineered for high conversion efficiency, voltage stability, and long operational life under Indian grid conditions.
whyChoose.reason2Title: Integrated Solar and EV Product Portfolio
whyChoose.reason2Description: We manufacture solar panels, batteries, smart PWM charge controllers, and EV chargers, delivering a complete renewable energy hardware ecosystem.
whyChoose.reason3Description: We support distributors, dealers, and institutional buyers with scalable production capacity and consistent product quality across categories.
whyChoose.reason4Description: Every product is built with strict quality controls to ensure reliability, durability, and long-term performance in demanding environments.

solarBenefits.item1Description: Generate power on-site and reduce dependence on utility rates.
solarBenefits.item2Description: Leverage central and state incentives to lower setup cost.
solarBenefits.item3Description: Reliable production and savings over 25+ years of operation.
solarBenefits.item4Description: Pair with storage to maintain power during outages and peaks.
solarBenefits.item5Description: Cut emissions while supporting a sustainable energy mix.
solarBenefits.item6Description: Durable systems with straightforward servicing and monitoring.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions About Our Solar and EV Products
faq.description: Clear answers about our solar inverters, EV chargers, batteries, and renewable energy hardware.
faq.supportDescription: Connect with our team for inverter selection, EV charger details, bulk supply inquiries, and dealership opportunities.
faq.item1Question: What types of inverters does Fujitek manufacture?
faq.item1Answer: We manufacture on-grid, off-grid, and hybrid solar inverters engineered for stable power conversion under Indian grid conditions.
faq.item2Answer: Fujitek Solar Energy focuses on manufacturing and product supply. Installation is handled by authorized dealers or third-party system integrators.
faq.item3Question: What warranties do your products include?
faq.item3Answer: All Fujitek products are backed by manufacturer warranties along with structured after-sales technical support.
faq.item4Question: Do your inverters support remote monitoring?
faq.item4Answer: Selected inverter models support real-time monitoring and system diagnostics depending on configuration.
faq.item5Question: Do you supply products in bulk?
faq.item5Answer: Yes. We supply solar inverters, EV chargers, batteries, and charge controllers to dealers, distributors, and institutional buyers across India.
faq.item6Question: What EV charging products do you offer?
faq.item6Answer: We manufacture lithium e-rickshaw chargers and electric scooty chargers designed for safe and efficient electric mobility charging.
